Alarico Marrowfield is the founder of Lumenforge Systems. Alarico raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

Orlando Lanternby is the founder of Nettleray Co. Orlando wants a technical co-founder intro before committing.

Lumenforge Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Alarico Marrowfield. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Harborlight Ventures is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Alarico Marrowfield and Orlando Lanternby both want Harborlight Ventures in the Lumenforge Systems round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
